final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing museum infographic for Chinese ethnic minority traditional costume.

Style/medium: museum exhibition panel, historical costume catalog, cultural heritage infographic, photorealistic illustration with paper texture background
Composition: top-down information layout with central full-body figure, left structural breakdown zone with leader lines, upper-right material/texture zone, middle-right pattern/color/cultural meaning zone, bottom wearing sequence flowchart
Subject: Chinese ethnic minority traditional costume full-body figure with detailed structural components
Scene/backdrop: rice white / silk paper white / light tea color paper texture background, archival museum aesthetic
Lighting/mood: soft even museum lighting, professional archival presentation
Color palette: muted earth tones, traditional ethnic textile colors, rice white, light tea, archival neutrals
Materials/textures: silk, brocade, embroidery, silver ornaments, woven fabrics, real textile swatches
Text (verbatim): 中国少数民族服饰
Constraints: all text must be simplified Chinese, clear and legible, no garbled characters or English; realistic structure, authentic materials, professional catalog tone; avoid poster/photography studio/e-commerce/anime/cosplay aesthetics
Avoid: poster feel, studio photography feel, e-commerce feel, anime feel, cosplay feel, incorrect labels, wrong structure, blurry text, fake materials, excessive decoration
